  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AudioManager
    Manages background music playback for the game.
    BaseArmor
    Abstract base class for all armor items.
    BaseCreature
    Abstract base class for all creatures in the game (players and monsters).
    BaseItem
    The base class for all items in the game.
    BasePotion
    Abstract base class for all potions.
    baseStone
    Abstract base class for all mineable ore and stone nodes in the game world.
    BaseWeapon
    Abstract base class for all weapons.
    BattleMenuController
    Manages the in-battle sub-menu state and skill cooldowns for the boss fight.
    BattleMenuController.MenuState
    Represents which sub-menu is currently visible.
    BattleMenuController.PotionEntry
    A lightweight view-model wrapping an ItemCounter for potions in the heal menu.
    BigHealthPotion
    A large health potion that restores 200 HP when consumed.
    BossController
    Controller for the sequential boss battle system.
    BossController.ActionResult
    Represents the outcome of a player or enemy action for the view to react to.
    BossController.BattleState
    Represents the current phase of the turn-based battle.
    BossController.BossInfo
    Immutable data holder for a boss entry (name, monster instance, and theme colour).
    BossView
    JavaFX view for the boss battle scene.
    Buyable
    Represents an item that can be purchased from a shop.
    Consumable
    Represents an item that can be consumed by the player, such as a potion.
    Craftable
    Represents an item that can be crafted using materials and gold.
    CraftingController
    Controller for the crafting station scene.
    CraftingController.CraftResult
    Immutable result of a crafting attempt.
    CraftingView
    JavaFX view for the crafting station overlay.
    EasyBoss
    Represents Akaza, the easy-tier boss demon.
    EasyMonster
    A weak enemy found on the game world map (Rui tier).
    Equipable
    Represents an item that can be equipped and unequipped by the player, such as a weapon or armor.
    GameController
    Controller for the main game world scene.
    GameController.BuildingType
    The type of building the player is adjacent to on the game world map.
    GameController.FloatingText
    A short piece of text that floats upward from a world position and fades out over time.
    GameController.MonsterEntity
    Represents a live monster entity on the world map, including its position, AI state, and movement variables.
    GameOverController
    Controller for the game-over / victory scene.
    GameOverView
    JavaFX view for the game-over / victory scene.
    GameView
    JavaFX view for the main game world scene.
    HardBoss
    Represents Muzan, the hard-tier final boss demon.
    HardMonster
    A tough enemy found on the game world map (Daki tier).
    HardStone
    A tougher stone ore node found in the game world.
    HardstoneArmor
    Tier-2 craftable armor made from Normal Stone and Hard Stone.
    HardstoneSword
    Tier-2 craftable sword made from Normal Stone and Hard Stone.
    HealMenuView
    Overlay panel displayed when the player opens the BAG menu during a boss battle.
    HealPotion
    A percentage-based healing potion that restores 20% of the player's maximum HP.
    InventoryController
    Controller for the inventory overlay scene.
    InventoryView
    JavaFX view for the inventory overlay.
    Iron
    An iron ore node found in the game world (uncommon rarity).
    IronArmor
    Tier-3 craftable armor made from Normal Stone and Iron.
    IronSword
    Tier-3 craftable sword made from Normal Stone and Iron.
    ItemCounter
    Represents an item paired with a quantity in the player's inventory.
    Lootable
    Represents an entity that drops money when defeated.
    Main
    Application entry point for "Tanjiro: The Swordsmith".
    MainMenuController
    Controller for the main-menu scene.
    MainMenuView
    JavaFX view for the main menu scene.
    MediumBoss
    Represents Kokushibo, the medium-tier boss demon.
    MediumHealthPotion
    A medium health potion that restores 100 HP when consumed.
    MediumMonster
    A mid-tier enemy found on the game world map (Enmu tier).
    Mineable
    Represents a stone or resource node that can be mined by the player.
    Mithril
    A mithril ore node found in the game world (rare rarity).
    MithrilArmor
    Tier-5 craftable armor made from Platinum and Mithril.
    MithrilSword
    Tier-5 craftable sword made from Platinum and Mithril.
    Monster
    Abstract base class for all monsters in the game.
    NormalStone
    A common stone ore node found throughout the game world.
    Pickaxe
    Represents a pickaxe used to mine ore nodes on the game world map.
    Platinum
    A platinum ore node found in the game world (rare rarity).
    PlatinumArmor
    Tier-4 craftable armor made from Iron and Platinum.
    PlatinumSword
    Tier-4 craftable sword made from Iron and Platinum.
    Player
    Represents the player character.
    Player.SkillResult
    Immutable record representing the outcome of a player skill.
    SceneManager
    Central scene coordinator for the game.
    ShopController
    Controller for the in-game shop scene.
    ShopController.BuyResult
    Immutable result of a purchase attempt.
    ShopController.ShopItem
    Immutable data holder for a shop catalogue entry.
    ShopView
    JavaFX view for the shop screen.
    SkillMenuView
    Overlay panel that displays the player's four combat skills during a boss battle.
    SmallHealthPotion
    A small health potion that restores 40 HP when consumed.
    Stackable
    Represents an item that can be stacked in the player's inventory.
    StoneArmor
    Tier-1 craftable armor made from Normal Stone.
    StoneSword
    Tier-1 craftable sword made from Normal Stone.
    Vibranium
    A vibranium ore node found in the game world (very rare rarity).
    VibraniumArmor
    Tier-6 (top-tier) craftable armor made from Mithril and Vibranium.
    VibraniumSword
    Tier-6 (top-tier) craftable sword made from Mithril and Vibranium.
    WoodenSword
    The starter weapon given to the player at the beginning of the game.
